evals.prompt: 帮我用这个 markdown 简历生成 PDF：test-resumes/sample-zh.md
evals.expected_output: Successfully parses Chinese resume, generates 5 SVG previews, starts template selector server, and compiles final PDF after template selection

evals.prompt: I have a resume at test-resumes/sample-en.md, please generate a typst resume PDF and save to ~/Desktop/tpr-output
evals.expected_output: Successfully parses English resume, respects custom output directory ~/Desktop/tpr-output, generates previews and compiles PDF

evals.prompt: 我有一份 markdown 格式的简历 test-resumes/sample-zh.md，能帮我排版成好看的 PDF 吗？
evals.expected_output: Skill triggers even without explicit mention of typst/template, follows the same four-phase workflow
